an3.5:1.1: “Monks, a person endowed with three qualities is to be recognized as a fool.
an3.5:1.3: He formulates a question inappropriately. He answers a question inappropriately.  When another answers a question appropriately—having chosen circumscribed, coherent words & phrases—he doesn’t approve of it.
an3.5:1.4: A person endowed with these three qualities is to be recognized as a fool.
an3.5:2.1: “Monks, a person endowed with three qualities is to be recognized as a wise person.
an3.5:2.3: He formulates a question appropriately. He answers a question appropriately. When another answers a question appropriately—having chosen circumscribed, coherent words & phrases—he approves of it.
an3.5:2.4: A person endowed with these three qualities is to be recognized as a wise person.”
